mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reply(post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, root_id, status, created_at) VALUES(#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{rootId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.post_id as postId, r.user_id as userId, u.nickname as nickname, u.username as username, r.parent_id as parentId, r.root_id as rootId, r.content, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_reply r LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} AND r.status = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_reply SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id as postId, user_id as userId, parent_id as parentId, root_id as rootId, content, status FROM forum_reply WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_reply WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM forum_reply WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND id = #{replyId} AND status = 0
